title: More Tools And Armor
description: Adds new tools and armor sets from dirt to obsidian, expanding survival-friendly progression in Minecraft.
body:
More Tools & Armor adds a large progression of new armor sets and tools to Minecraft, designed to stay mostly survival-friendly and vanilla-style.

This mod expands the game from early-game materials like dirt and cobblestone all the way up to endgame materials like obsidian. (Bedrock is not included since it is not obtainable in survival gameplay.)

Each material tier comes with its own full tool set and armor set, including examples like:

Dirt, Cobblestone, Iron Block, and Diamond Block gear
Copper-based gear (for supported versions)
High-tier Obsidian tools and armor as the strongest set

The goal is to give players more progression paths without breaking vanilla balance too much, while still adding fun and unique upgrades.

⚠️ Note: This is my first mod, and I am actively rebuilding and improving it after losing the original workspace.
This Mod On Curseforge: [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/armor-tools-and-wepons)
